creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you get debug output from nxssh to get an error message?

Are you using the default private keys that ship with opennx on the
CentOS machine?  My suspicion is that you are and, if you haven't
distributed the newly generated one that your port generated, this could
certainly cause an issue.

The FreeBSD port automatically generates an SSH key at install time to
eliminate the security risks of using the pre-packaged one that is
available to the world.

Please note that the above is just a guess.
-r
